prompt: Find me a bull put spread on AAPL.

assertions.name: trade_card_present
assertions.description: Response contains the formatted box trade card with SELL and BUY legs shown

assertions.name: has_both_legs
assertions.description: Response explicitly shows both the short (SELL) put strike and the long (BUY) put strike

assertions.name: has_full_metrics
assertions.description: Response includes all five metrics: max profit, max loss, breakeven, probability of profit, and return on risk

assertions.name: uses_default_20_delta
assertions.description: Response targets ~20 delta for the short put since none was specified

assertions.name: uses_35_45_dte
assertions.description: Response targets an expiry in the 35–45 DTE window

assertions.name: has_risk_checklist
assertions.description: Response includes a risk signal checklist covering at least earnings and IV rank
